---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for Comis
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? (e.g., "I'm frustrated when...")

## Proposed Solution

How you would like this to work.

## Alternatives Considered

Other approaches you have thought about.

## Which Package(s)

Which of the Comis packages would this affect?

- [ ] `@comis/core`
- [ ] `@comis/shared`
- [ ] `@comis/cli`
- [ ] `@comis/agent`
- [ ] `@comis/memory`
- [ ] `@comis/channels`
- [ ] `@comis/skills`
- [ ] `@comis/gateway`
- [ ] `@comis/daemon`
- [ ] `@comis/scheduler`
- [ ] `@comis/infra`
- [ ] `@comis/web`

## Additional Context

Any other context, mockups, or examples.
